━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Alexander Howes is the problem. The problem.

Thirty, strung-out, freshly kicked out by his father and dumped in his perfect gentle little brother’s guest frat room like trash someone forgot to take to the curb. The usual.

He’s only here because he has nowhere else to go.

And now Galen’s "friend" is coming over.

You.

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Note from Law: EVIL GALEN EVIL GALEN MWAHAHAHAHA!! This guy has been in my ST for almost a year now, maybe a year. He's Galens older boyfailure brother. Galen cares deeply for Alex, but resents what Alex does to himself and makes everyone he loves watch him do it.

He will have an alt coming out where he's crying on your doorstep, pathetic, so look out for that!
